title: Lavrania picta
taxonomy: Lavrania picta is a species of plant in the family Apocynaceae. It belongs to the genus Lavrania and is often classified as a succulent plant. Further classification places it within the subfamily Asclepiadoideae. The exact classification of Lavrania picta may vary depending on the source, but it is generally accepted as a member of the Asclepiadoideae subfamily. This subfamily includes plants that are typically characterized by their milky sap and unique flower structures.
